creator: mark@foster.cc
text:
Deprecate this port, has been bundled into p5-Kwiki as of 0.39

Fix: --BEGIN PATCH--


+DEPRECATED=		already bundled in www/p5-Kwiki (0.39 or latter)
+EXPIRATION_DATE=	2007-07-28
+IGNORE=		${DEPRECATED}
+
 PERL_CONFIGURE=	yes

 MAN3=		Kwiki::Icons::Gnome.3

--END PATCH----jxmkhdXiO0bzc6ZjSRoikpwBgjXFmWH3a1NJBKGNSh7XA81a
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.diff"

diff -ur p5-Kwiki-Icons-Gnome.orig/Makefile p5-Kwiki-Icons-Gnome/Makefile
--- p5-Kwiki-Icons-Gnome.orig/Makefile	Fri Jun  2 00:42:08 2006
+++ p5-Kwiki-Icons-Gnome/Makefile	Wed May 30 15:17:52 2007
@@ -18,6 +18,10 @@
 BUILD_DEPENDS=	${SITE_PERL}/Kwiki.pm:${PORTSDIR}/www/p5-Kwiki
 RUN_DEPENDS=	${BUILD_DEPENDS}
How-To-Repeat: n/a
